title: Quantity Satchels
description: A mod that aims to add satchels inspired by the community-made game Space Station 13. (don't play SS13, seriously, don't)
body:
This is the BigBag mod, it adds satchels.

Satchels in a nutshell:

 

- They consume space instead of slots, aka all items are stored in the same slot.

 

- They have 1728 spaces for items.

 

- They're specialized, there's the ore satchel, the food satchel and the seed satchel.

 

- They're somewhat difficult to craft. (2 iron blocks, 1 iron ingot and 3 other items to transmutate it into it's variants)

 

- They can't store enchanted, named or any other type of item that has NBT.
